usage: editTrim [-help] [-keep_floating_stubs] [-status {COVER FIXED NOSHIELD ROUTED SHIELD}] [-type {float}] [-all  | -selected  | -nets <net>*] [-all  | -selected  | -layers <string>] [-all  | -selected  | -area {x1 y1 x2 y2}]

options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies to trim all special wires and floating stubs.

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates for the area from which to trim the wires.

options.name: -keep_floating_stubs
options.description: Specifies whether to keep floating stubs in trim.

options.name: -layers
options.description: Specifies the layers from which to trim wires.

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies the nets of wires to be trim. ((net)*, optional)

options.name: -status
options.description: {COVER FIXED NOSHIELD ROUTED SHIELD} Specifies the status of wires to trim.

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies to removes wires that do not have electrical connections to other wires or pins (floating wires).
